title: Make Leitstand Git health worktree-aware
goal: Make Leitstand runtime-health Git identity resolution support both normal checkouts and linked Git worktrees without weakening fail-closed health semantics.

acceptance.assertion: Runtime health resolves Git HEAD and ref data when .git is either a directory or a linked-worktree gitdir file.
Existing normal-checkout health behavior and fail-closed error reporting remain unchanged.
An automated test creates or simulates a linked worktree and proves the health receipt reports the expected commit instead of a false failure.
The fix changes only Git identity discovery and does not add execution authority, network dependencies or mutable health state.

metadata.evidence: Leitstand consumer PR local full suite passed 340 of 341 tests; tests/serverHealth.test.ts failed reproducibly only in a linked worktree because runtimeHealth Git discovery assumed a .git directory. GitHub CI in a normal checkout was green.
